detectors.description:

	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (InuWomensDay.sol#591)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (InuWomensDay.sol#593)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (InuWomensDay.sol#593)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (InuWomensDay.sol#603)
	InuWomensDay.tradingOpen (InuWomensDay.sol#289) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- InuWomensDay.openTrading() (InuWomensDay.sol#581-607)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in InuWomensDay._transfer(address,address,uint256) (InuWomensDay.sol#447-511):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (InuWomensDay.sol#493)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (InuWomensDay.sol#525-537)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (InuWomensDay.sol#499)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (InuWomensDay.sol#575)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (InuWomensDay.sol#509)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (InuWomensDay.sol#663)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (InuWomensDay.sol#643)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (InuWomensDay.sol#645)
	InuWomensDay._rOwned (InuWomensDay.sol#247) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- InuWomensDay._takeTeam(uint256) (InuWomensDay.sol#657-665)
	- InuWomensDay._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (InuWomensDay.sol#639-653)
	- InuWomensDay.balanceOf(address) (InuWomensDay.sol#365-369)
	- InuWomensDay.constructor() (InuWomensDay.sol#315-329)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (InuWomensDay.sol#509)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (InuWomensDay.sol#671)
	InuWomensDay._rTotal (InuWomensDay.sol#263) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- InuWomensDay._getCurrentSupply() (InuWomensDay.sol#763-773)
	- InuWomensDay._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (InuWomensDay.sol#669-675)
	- InuWomensDay.constructor() (InuWomensDay.sol#315-329)
	- InuWomensDay.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (InuWomensDay.sol#421-429)
